name: @getcoherent/core
description: Core design system engine for Coherent
author: Coherent Design Method

scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "if (!(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '').includes('pnpm')) { console.error('
❌ Use pnpm publish, not npm publish.
Reason: npm does not resolve workspace:* protocol, publishing will break global install.
Run: pnpm publish --no-git-checks
'); process.exit(1); }"
